limitations: The clean-environment install was not tested without access to preinstalled wheels or the internet.
Independent reproduction is author-produced, not a third-party replication.
The independent AD verifier re-certifies the precision-fixed local root boxes but relies on the Round50 interval monotonicity/curvature implementation for the global uniform-level claim.

The archived Round50 Newton code constructed mpmath endpoints at import-time default precision; its Arb interval certificate remained valid, and the Round51 precision-fixed rerun removes this center-residual inconsistency.
